Package neqsim.process.diagnostics

Class HypothesisGenerator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.HypothesisGenerator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HypothesisGenerator extends Object implements Serializable
Generates ranked root-cause hypotheses from equipment type, symptom, and reliability data.

The generator maintains a built-in library of symptom-to-hypothesis mappings for common equipment types (compressor, pump, separator, heat exchanger, valve). Users may register custom hypotheses via register(String, Symptom, Hypothesis).

Prior probabilities are sourced from ReliabilityDataSource when available, falling back to a uniform distribution over candidate hypotheses.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

      • Constant Field Values

    • logger

      private static final org.apache.logging.log4j.Logger logger

    • registry

      private final Map<String,List<Hypothesis.Builder>> registry
      Registry: equipmentType + symptom to list of hypothesis builders. Key format: "equipmentType:SYMPTOM".

  • Constructor Details

    • HypothesisGenerator

      public HypothesisGenerator()
      Creates a generator with the built-in hypothesis library.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public void register(String equipmentType, Symptom symptom, Hypothesis hypothesis)
      Registers a custom hypothesis for an equipment type and symptom.
      Parameters:
      equipmentType - equipment type key (e.g., "Compressor", "Separator")
      symptom - the observable symptom
      hypothesis - pre-built hypothesis to add

    • generate

      public List<Hypothesis> generate(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment, Symptom symptom)
      Generates hypotheses for the given equipment and symptom.

      The method looks up hypotheses from the registry based on the equipment class name. If no match is found for the specific equipment type, it falls back to a generic set. Prior probabilities are adjusted using OREDA failure-mode data when available.

      Parameters:
      equipment - the process equipment exhibiting the symptom
      symptom - the observed symptom
      Returns:
      list of hypotheses sorted by prior probability (descending)

    • classifyEquipment

      String classifyEquipment(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment)
      Classifies a process equipment instance into a type key.
      Parameters:
      equipment - equipment instance
      Returns:
      type key string

    • adjustPriorsFromOreda

      void adjustPriorsFromOreda(List<Hypothesis> hypotheses, String equipmentType)
      Adjusts hypothesis prior probabilities using OREDA failure-mode data.
      Parameters:
      hypotheses - hypotheses to adjust
      equipmentType - equipment type for OREDA lookup

    • findFuzzyModeProbability

      private Double findFuzzyModeProbability(Map<String,Double> modeProbabilities, String failureMode)
      Finds a fuzzy OREDA mode probability when exact naming differs from the hypothesis library.

      Uses a three-tier matching strategy: (1) substring containment, (2) token overlap with at least 50% match, (3) Levenshtein edit distance within 3 characters. Returns the first confident match found.

      Parameters:
      modeProbabilities - normalized failure mode probability map
      failureMode - hypothesis failure mode
      Returns:
      matched probability, or null if no reliable match is found

    • levenshteinDistance

      private int levenshteinDistance(String a, String b)
      Computes the Levenshtein edit distance between two strings.
      Parameters:
      a - first string
      b - second string
      Returns:
      minimum single-character edits (insert, delete, replace) needed

    • normalize

      private String normalize(String text)
      Normalizes a phrase for fuzzy failure-mode matching.
      Parameters:
      text - text to normalize
      Returns:
      lower-case alphanumeric text

    • makeKey

      private String makeKey(String equipmentType, Symptom symptom)
      Builds a registry key.
      Parameters:
      equipmentType - equipment type
      symptom - symptom
      Returns:
      key string
